tasks.instruction: Choose the correct answer A, B or C.

items.stem: The teacher told us to look _________ any new words in the dictionary.
I couldn't put _________ with the noise from the building site any longer.
Nobody could work _________ how the magician did the trick.
She takes _________ her mother — they have the same smile and laugh.
We had to call _________ the school trip because of the storm.
It took me ages to come _________ with a good idea for my project.
